com.google.android.material.textfield.Te.android:hint: Name of Child (Last Name, Full Name, MI)
Complete Name of Mother (Last Name, Full Name, MI)

TextView.android:text: Counts should be consistent with Maternal TCL Livebirths

CheckBox.android:text: Td2 given to mother 1 month prior to delivery (first pregnancy)
Td3 to Td5 (or Td1–Td5) given anytime prior to delivery

TextView.android:text: More than 24 hrs to 11 mos 29 days
More than 24 hrs to 11 mos 29 days
